description: User clicks the 'Open' button on the instruction screen to begin the session, triggering a new browser tab.
frame_description: A dark instruction screen transitions to a browser window.

description: The browser navigates from a blank page to google.com.
frame_description: The 'Untitled' tab loads the Google homepage.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' tab to switch focus away from Google.
frame_description: The active tab changes from Google to Askable Sessions.
